qas.q: a green LED indicator light is flickering
system shuts down from overheating
qas.a: Check fan operation and clean if needed.

qas.q: Computer is connected but no indicators light up and system won't power on
POST generates an error via beeps
Loud, unusual noises coming from tower
qas.a: Check fans and drives for obstruction or failure

qas.q: Newly installed extra memory module is not recognized
qas.a: Ensure the module is seated correctly

qas.q: Power supply in place but shuts down and is not functioning properly.
Receive error during boot sector load
qas.a: Check for software or driver problems

qas.q: Peripheral device connected but not recognized
qas.a: Examine cable end and port for damage

qas.q: Keyboard sticking and not functioning properly
qas.a: Clean with compressed air and check connection.

qas.q: CRT image geometry is distorted
Low color depth. Images appear blocky or grainy.
Stuck or dead pixels
Screen objects appear to large.
Image appears very dim.
Artwork color output different than display's.
Image burn-in creating ghosted elements.
Color glitches. Purple or green horizontal lines.
No image is displayed.
qas.a: Ensure display is plugged-in and connected.

qas.q: Unexpected STOP errors at startup.
